prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组（含物理类）最低位次约7938→9955→10959→13011→13637，呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约5699名，近3年累计后移约2678名；2025年基准 约13637名；本省理科组计划2021年32人、2022年32人、2023年32人、2024年35人、2025年40人；2026年计划36人，较2025年减少4人（缩招10%），竞争 压力理论上有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第82名，近年排名稳定在80–84区间，属全国中上游水平；2025 年声誉评价偏正面（新闻传播学A++），抖音热度为高热（总排名第11位）；2026年声誉评价偏负面（宿舍火灾事件），但整体关注度仍高；未见明显投档断档记录；新闻传播学为A+（全国顶尖），与该校物理类招生专业中的传播学、广告学（计算广告双学士学位实验班）、数字出版等交叉专业高度匹配；工科专业（数字媒体技术、通 信工程、人工智能等）虽无A类学科评估，但依托传媒行业特色，就业方向独特。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类社会热度高热推荐，计算机类推荐，人工智能谨慎观望；中传物理类招生专业涵盖数字媒体技术、人工智能、通信工程等热门方向，对考生有较强吸引力；江西省2026年普通高考总人数约474900人，物理类考生近年持续增长（2024年 263429→2025年266425），竞争加剧；省控线数据已纳入参考；中国传媒大学位于北京，对江西省考生有较强跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划缩招10%（位次前移动力）、本省物理类考生持续增长（位次后移压力）、学校声誉偏正面但行业热度分化等 因素，缩招效应与考生增长效应部分对冲；预测最低位次约12899名，区间12399–13399名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Science Group (including Physics Category) was approximately 7938 → 9955 → 10959 → 13011 → 13637, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5699 places in the past 5 years and about 2678 places in the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 13637 places; the provincial Science Group plan was 32 students in 2021, 32 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 40 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 36 students, a decrease of 4 students (10% reduction) compared to 2025, theoretically easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 80–84 range in recent years, at the upper-middle level nationwide; the 2025 reputation evaluation is relatively positive (Journalism and Communication A++), with high Douyin popularity (11th overall); the 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively negative (dormitory fire incident), but overall attention remains high; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; Journalism and Communication is A+ (top in the country), highly matching the cross-disciplinary majors in the Physics Category such as Communication, Advertising (Computational Advertising Dual Bachelor's Degree Experimental Class), and Digital Publishing; engineering majors (Digital Media Technology, Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) do not have A-level discipline evaluations but rely on the characteristics of the media industry, offering unique employment directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended socially, Computer majors are recommended, Artificial Intelligence is cautiously observed; the Physics Category enrollment majors at Communication University of China include popular directions such as Digital Media Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Communication Engineering, which are strongly attractive to candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province General College Entrance Examination is about 474,900, with the number of Physics Category candidates growing continuously in recent years (263,429 in 2024 → 266,425 in 2025), intensifying competition; provincial control score data has been included for reference; Communication University of China is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal to Jiangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 10% enrollment reduction in 2026 (driving rankings forward), the continuous growth of Physics Category candidates in the province (driving rankings backward), the relatively positive school reputation but industry popularity divergence, the reduction effect and candidate growth effect partially offset each other; the predicted minimum ranking is about 12,899, with a range of 12,399–13,399.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 12,399–13,399, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Communication/Electronic/Data majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 Digital Media Technology/Artificial Intelligence as a stretch, and use Tier 3 Information Management/Digital Economy as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 12,399), you can focus on challenging popular majors such as Digital Media Technology and the Artificial Intelligence Experimental Class.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group (including history category) was approximately 892 → 1029 → 1262 → 4735 → 1789, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend; in 2024, due to the splitting of major groups, an abnormally high ranking of 4735 occurred, and in 2025 it returned to 1789, with a cumulative shift of about 527 places over the past two years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 1789; the provincial liberal arts group plan was 14 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 17 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 17, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 80–84 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; the reputation evaluation in 2025 was relatively positive (Journalism and Communication discipline ranked A++), with high popularity on Douyin (ranked 11th overall) and high short video exposure; the reputation evaluation in 2026 was relatively negative (dormitory fire incident), but overall attention remains high; no significant record of admission gaps; Journalism and Communication is A+ (top nationally), highly matching the university's enrollment majors (Journalism, Communication, Network and New Media, Advertising, etc.), with a strong disciplinary brand effect.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Since 2023, the social popularity of journalism and communication majors has shown a clear trend of discouragement (influenced by the Zhang Xuefeng incident), but as a top institution in the industry, the Communication University of China's brand effect can partially offset negative industry sentiment; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Provincial General College Entrance Examination is approximately 474,900, slightly increased from 2025, with the proportion of history category candidates estimated at about 43.6% based on recent averages, approximately 207,000 people, leading to slightly intensified competition; provincial control score data has been incorporated as a reference; the Communication University of China is located in Beijing, exerting strong cross-provincial appeal to Jiangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the fluctuating upward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in the total number of provincial candidates, a relatively positive university reputation but cooling popularity of the journalism and communication industry, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 1789; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1804, with a range of 1479–2129.
